mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_jobs WHERE status NOT IN ('DELIVERED', 'EXCEPTION') AND last_event_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY last_event_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delivery_jobs WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_jobs (tracking_number, status, courier_id, dispatcher_id, sender_name, sender_address, sender_phone_enc, receiver_name, receiver_address, receiver_phone_enc, receiver_state, receiver_zip, weight_lbs, order_amount, customer_token, admin_override, override_comment, last_event_at, version) VALUES (#{trackingNumber}, #{status}, #{courierId}, #{dispatcherId}, #{senderName}, #{senderAddress}, #{senderPhoneEncrypted}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverAddress}, #{receiverPhoneEncrypted}, #{receiverState}, #{receiverZip}, #{weightLbs}, #{orderAmount}, #{customerToken}, #{adminOverride}, #{overrideComment}, #{lastEventAt}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_jobs SET courier_id = #{courierId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE delivery_jobs SET last_event_at = #{lastEventAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE delivery_jobs SET customer_token = #{customerToken}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE delivery_jobs SET admin_override = 1, override_comment = #{overrideComment}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
